general.title: General
general.subtitle: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.
general.deploymentLocalTrusted: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
general.deploymentPublic: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
general.deploymentPrivate: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
general.censorDesc: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
general.shortcutsDesc: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
general.backupDesc: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
general.feedbackDesc: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
general.feedbackPromptNotice: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
general.feedbackDenyDesc: Keep voted AI outputs local only.
general.signOutDesc: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

mac.step1: 打开 Finder 并导航到该文件夹。
mac.step2: 右键点击（或按住 Control 点击）该文件夹。
mac.step3: 按住 Option（⌥）键——“拷贝”会变成“拷贝为路径名称”。
mac.step4: 点击“拷贝为路径名称”，然后粘贴到这里。
mac.tip: 你也可以打开“终端”，输入 cd，将文件夹拖入终端窗口，然后按 Enter。接着输入 pwd 即可看到完整路径。

windows.step1: 打开文件资源管理器并导航到该文件夹。
windows.step2: 点击顶部的地址栏——完整路径就会显示出来。
windows.step3: 复制路径，然后粘贴到这里。
windows.tip: 或者，按住 Shift 并右键点击文件夹，然后选择“复制为路径”。

linux.step1: 打开终端并使用 cd 导航到该目录。
linux.step2: 运行 pwd 以打印完整路径。
linux.step3: 复制输出内容并粘贴到这里。
linux.tip: 在大多数文件管理器中，按 Ctrl+L 即可在地址栏显示完整路径。
